query:
INSERT INTO tachyon_apps_llms.terminologies (
                id, tenant_id, user_id, original_term, preferred_term,
                context, created_at, last_used_at
            )
            VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
            ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
                original_term = VALUES(original_term),
                preferred_term = VALUES(preferred_term),
                context = VALUES(context),
                last_used_at = VALUES(last_used_at)
